---
title: "3338230014_pert.12_statistika spasial"
author: "Muhammad Fabian Reinhard Delano"
date: "2025-11-08"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
  reference_docx: default.docx
always_allow_html: true
---

## Download Package yang dibutuhkan
```{r}
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(tmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(bispdep)
library(mapview)
library(dplyr)
library(psych)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)
library(lmtest)
library(spdep)
library(spatialreg)
```

### meng-Import Data yang akan diolah
```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Import Data
# -------------------------------------------------------

setwd("/Users/M.Fabian.R.D/Desktop/SEMESTER 5/STATISTIKA SPASIAL/PERTEMUAN 12")
shp_NTT<-st_read("/Users/M.Fabian.R.D/Desktop/SEMESTER 5/STATISTIKA SPASIAL/PERTEMUAN 12/[geosai.my.id]NTT_Kab/Nusa_Tenggara_Timur_ADMIN_BPS.shp")

# Data banjir dan sanitasi 2024
Data_wasting_stunting_kemiskinan <-read_excel("garis kemiskinan dan stunting.xlsx")

# Ganti semua nilai NA jadi 0 hanya di kolom numerik
Data_wasting_stunting_kemiskinan <- Data_wasting_stunting_kemiskinan %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ replace(., is.na(.), 0)))

# Gabungkan Data shapefile kabupaten/kota
shp_Join <- shp_NTT %>%
  left_join(Data_wasting_stunting_kemiskinan, by = c("Kabupaten" = "Kabupaten/Kota"))
names(shp_Join)

#Pemetaan Variabel kemiskinan 
mapview(shp_Join, zcol = "Jumlah Balita gizi buruk")

#Pemetaan Variabel Stunting 
mapview(shp_Join, zcol = "Tenaga Gizi")

describe(Data_wasting_stunting_kemiskinan[c("Jumlah Balita gizi buruk", "Tenaga Gizi")])
#-------------------------------------------------------------
```

```{r}
cor.test(shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`,shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`)
```

### membobotkan matriks
```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Membuat matriks bobot spasial
# -------------------------------------------------------
# Queen contiguity
nb1 <- poly2nb(shp_Join, queen = TRUE)
lw1 <- nb2listw(nb1, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

moranbiv_queen1 <- moranbi.test(shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`,shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`,lw1,rank=TRUE,zero.policy=TRUE,alternative="two.sided")

moranbiv_queen1
```

### mencari titik centroid data serta menghitung jarak moran
```{r}
#-------------------------------------------------------------
#Pembobot 1/jara
#-------------------------------------------------------------
centroid<-st_centroid(shp_Join)
longlat<-st_coordinates(centroid)
jarak<-dist(longlat)
w<-as.matrix(1/jarak)
lw<-mat2listw(w)

moranbiv_jarak <- moranbi.test(shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`,shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`,lw,rank=TRUE,zero.policy=TRUE,alternative="two.sided")

moranbiv_jarak
```

### Pembobotan menggunakan KNN
```{r}
#-------------------------------------------------------------
#PEMBOBOT KNN
#-------------------------------------------------------------
longlat<- as.matrix(longlat)
k1<-knn2nb(knearneigh(longlat,k=3))
listw<-nb2listw(k1)

moranbiv_knn <- moranbi.test(shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`,shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`,listw,rank=TRUE,zero.policy=TRUE,alternative="two.sided")
moranbiv_knn
#-------------------------------------------------------------
```

### Test Global Bivariate
```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Global Bivariate Moran’s I
# -------------------------------------------------------
# Jumlah Tenaga Gizi (x) dengan Jumlah Balita gizi buruk (y)
moran_biv_as <- moranbi.test(
  shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`,
  shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`,
  lw1,
  rank = TRUE,
  zero.policy = TRUE,
  alternative = "two.sided"
)

moran_biv_as

# standarisasi peubah
scale.jumlah_balita_gizi_buruk <- scale(shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`) %>% as.vector()
scale.Tenaga_Kerja <- scale(shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`) %>% as.vector()

# moran scatterplot dasar
moran.plot(
  x = scale.jumlah_balita_gizi_buruk,              
  listw = lw1, # Spatial weight
  labels = as.character(shp_Join$Kabupaten),
  y = scale.Tenaga_Kerja,           
  zero.policy = TRUE,
  xlab = "Jumlah gizi buruk balita",
  ylab = "Jumlah tenaga kesehatan gizi",
  main = "Moran Scatter Plot Bivariat: fasilitas kesehatan Vs keluhan kesehatan"
)
# Dark mode untuk poster
par(bg = "mediumaquamarine", col.lab = "black", col.axis = "black", col.main = "black")

```

### Test LISA (Local Bivariate Morans)
```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Local Bivariate Moran’s I (LISA)
# -------------------------------------------------------

# Hitung Local Bivariate Moran’s I
local_biv <- localmoran.bi(
  shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`,
  shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`,
  lw1,
  zero.policy = TRUE,
  alternative = "two.sided"
)

# Simpan hasil ke dalam kolom baru
shp_Join$localI  <- local_biv[, 1]
shp_Join$E.Ii    <- local_biv[, 2]
shp_Join$Var.Ii  <- local_biv[, 3]
shp_Join$Z.Ii    <- local_biv[, 4]
shp_Join$Pvalue  <- local_biv[, 5]

# Buat kolom signifikan / tidak signifikan
shp_Join$Signif <- ifelse(shp_Join$Pvalue < 0.05, "Signifikan", "Tidak Signifikan")

# -------------------------------------------------------
# Standarisasi dan hitung lag variabel X (Tenaga Gizi)
# -------------------------------------------------------

# Standarisasi nilai Y (Jumlah Balita Gizi Buruk)
shp_Join$scale.Y <- scale(shp_Join$`Tenaga Gizi`) %>% as.vector()

# Standarisasi nilai X (Tenaga Gizi)
shp_Join$scale.X <- scale(shp_Join$`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk`) %>% as.vector()

# Hitung lag spasial untuk X
shp_Join$lag.X <- lag.listw(lw1, shp_Join$scale.X, zero.policy = TRUE)

# -------------------------------------------------------
# Tentukan kuadran LISA (High-High, Low-Low, dll)
# -------------------------------------------------------

shp_Join$quad_sig <- NA

shp_Join$quad_sig <- NA
shp_Join$quad_sig[shp_Join$scale.Y >= 0 & shp_Join$lag.X >= 0 & shp_Join$Pvalue <= 0.5] <- "High-High"
shp_Join$quad_sig[shp_Join$scale.Y <= 0 & shp_Join$lag.X <= 0 & shp_Join$Pvalue <= 0.5] <- "Low-Low"
shp_Join$quad_sig[shp_Join$scale.Y < 0  & shp_Join$lag.X > 0  & shp_Join$Pvalue <= 0.5] <- "Low-High"
shp_Join$quad_sig[shp_Join$scale.Y > 0  & shp_Join$lag.X < 0  & shp_Join$Pvalue <= 0.5] <- "High-Low"


# -------------------------------------------------------
# Klasifikasi Signifikansi Umum
# -------------------------------------------------------
shp_Join$sig <- ifelse(shp_Join$Pvalue <= 0.05, "Signifikan", "Tidak Signifikan")

# -------------------------------------------------------
# Cek hasil akhir (5 baris pertama)
# -------------------------------------------------------
head(shp_Join[, c("localI", "Pvalue", "Signif", "quad_sig", "sig")])
```

```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Visualisasi Hasil LISA (Tanpa mengubah data)
# -------------------------------------------------------

unique(shp_Join$quad_sig)
table(shp_Join$quad_sig, useNA = "ifany")

# Pemetaan Kuadran Local Moran
tm_shape(shp_Join) +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "quad_sig",
    palette = c(
      "High-High" = "blue",
      "Low-Low"   = "springgreen3",
      "Low-High"  = "green",
      "High-Low"  = "hotpink2"
    ),
    title = "Jumlah Balita Gizi Buruk vs Tenaga Gizi",
    colorNA = "gray85",     # 💡 warna untuk area NA (tidak signifikan)
    textNA  = "Tidak Signifikan"  # label untuk NA di legenda
  ) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.title.size = 1.2,
    legend.text.size = 0.9
  )
```

```{r}
# uji normalitas
# Y = wasting, X1 = stunting
model <- lm(`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk` ~ `Tenaga Gizi`,
            data = Data_wasting_stunting_kemiskinan)

summary(model)
shapiro.test(residuals(model))

# uji heterokedastisitas
bptest(model)

# uji autokorelasi
dwtest(model)
```

```{r}
# Model SAR
model_SAR <- lagsarlm(`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk` ~ `Tenaga Gizi`,
                      data = shp_Join,
                      listw = lw1,
                      zero.policy = TRUE)

summary(model_SAR)
```

```{r}
# Model SEM
model_SEM <- errorsarlm(`Jumlah Balita gizi buruk` ~ `Tenaga Gizi`,
                      data = shp_Join,
                      listw = lw1,
                      zero.policy = TRUE)

summary(model_SEM)
```
